## Why

Today users struggle with X — they have to manually correlate Y and Z across three different dashboards, which produces drift and rework. The cost is paid every sprint by the on-call rotation.

## What

Build a single dashboard that joins Y and Z server-side and exposes a cached read endpoint. Ship a CLI inspector for power users.
